\tzpentry{ID3870}{Coupled Quantum Quantum State Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3870 introduces Coupled Quantum Quantum State Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi[t] = \exp\left(-\frac{i}{\hbar}\int_0^t \hat{H}[\tau] d\tau\right) \Psi[0] \in \mathcal{M} \end{equation}
